basic_details.organization_name: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Panikoili, Jajpur
basic_details.short_information: JNV Panikoili is engaging teachers for Computer Science subjects on contractual basis.

qualification.details: Age Limit: Upper age limit 50 years as on 01.01.2026. | Desirable: B.Ed./M.Ed., teaching experience, residential school experience, computer knowledge, regional language.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview on 27.07.2026. Shortlisting will be done based on application and documents.
how_to_apply: Appear for Walk-in Interview on 27.07.2026 at 10:00 AM with all original documents.
important_instructions: Only applications through the official website will be accepted. No WhatsApp/call will be made; check email regularly. The Principal reserves the right to accept or reject any application. Jurisdiction: Court at Jajpur Headquarters.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI JNV Jajpur Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: PM SHRI School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Panikoili, Jajpur, Odisha has invited applications for PGT (Computer Science) and TGT (Computer Science) on contract basis. The notification includes qualification, experience, remuneration, and interview details. Candidates are advised to read the full notification before applying. Download Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Panikoili Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Age Limit: Upper age limit 50 years as on 01.01.2026. Desirable: B.Ed./M.Ed., teaching experience, residential school experience, computer knowledge, regional language.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI JNV Jajpur Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview on 27.07.2026. Shortlisting will be done based on application and documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for JNV Jajpur Teacher Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit app.jnvjajpur.com. Fill the online application form. Submit on or before 26.07.2026. Appear for Walk-in Interview on 27.07.2026 at 10:00 AM with all original documents.

content_sections.heading: PM SHRI JNV Jajpur Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only applications through the official website will be accepted. No WhatsApp/call will be made; check email regularly. The Principal reserves the right to accept or reject any application. Jurisdiction: Court at Jajpur Headquarters.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JNV Panikoili Teacher Recruitment 2026?
Q2. When is the Walk-in Interview for JNV Panikoili?
Q3. What is the remuneration for PGT Computer Science in JNV?
Q4. What is the age limit for JNV Teacher posts?
faq.answer: Upper age limit 50 years as on 01.01.2026.

faq.question: Q5. What qualification is required for TGT Computer Science?
faq.answer: B.Tech / B.E. / B.Sc. / BCA in Computer Science/IT with 50% marks.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for JNV Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: All original certificates, experience letters, and application printout.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job in Navodaya Vidyalaya?
faq.answer: No, it is on contractual basis for the academic session 2026-27.
